version: 1.0.0
---
# Test Story

## Changelog

| Version | Date | Change |
|---------|------|--------|
| 1.0.0 | 2026-01-01 | Initial |
| 1.0.0 | 2026-01-02 | Duplicate |
HEREDOC

OUTPUT=$(echo "$PAYLOAD" | CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT=/Users/jmagady/Dev/vsdd-factory/plugins/vsdd-factory bash /Users/jmagady/Dev/vsdd-factory/plugins/vsdd-factory/hooks/validate-changelog-monotonicity.sh 2>&1; echo "EXIT:$?")
echo "Output: $OUTPUT"
echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "^BLOCKED by validate-changelog-monotonicity:" && echo "FORMAT: canonical" || echo "FORMAT: non-canonical"
echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "Fix:" && echo "HAS FIX: yes" || echo "HAS FIX: no"
echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "Code:" && echo "HAS CODE: yes" || echo "HAS CODE: no"
LINE_COUNT=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -c '.' || true)
echo "Non-empty lines: $LINE_COUNT"
rm -rf /tmp/test-factory
